evals.prompt: Use $pr to publish this work. The worktree has unrelated local changes too.
expectations: Inspects status and diff before staging.
Does not use git add -A without confirming the whole worktree is in scope.
Asks which paths belong in the PR.
Does not push before scope is clear.

evals.prompt: Use $pr to create a draft PR for the current local changes from main.
expectations: Creates a repo-native branch before committing, using codex/{description} only when the repo already uses that convention or the user asks for it.
Stages only intended changes and commits tersely.
Pushes with tracking and opens a draft PR.

evals.prompt: Use $pr to address the actionable comments on the current pull request.
expectations: Resolves the PR and inspects review context before editing.
Clusters actionable feedback separately from outdated, resolved, informational, or judgment-heavy comments.
Implements only selected or clearly actionable fixes and reports remaining comments.
